section.title: Introduction
section.para: The opennlp-wordnet module loads a WordNet-style lexicon into a LexicalKnowledgeBase and looks up synsets by lemma and part of speech. Two readers are provided: WnLmfReader for the Global WordNet Association WN-LMF XML interchange format, and WndbReader for the classic Princeton WordNet database file layout. Both return an immutable, thread-safe knowledge base.

section.title: Loading a lexicon
Lookup
Morphy lemmatization
